rationale: Coinglass public pages display ORDI funding rates and open interest charts visually but do not expose raw numeric values via a free public API endpoint; correlation coefficients require downloading 30-day OHLCV series and computing them, which CoinGecko free tier provides price history for but does not pre-compute correlations — all values therefore require either a paid data subscription (Coinglass Pro, Glassnode, Kaiko) or manual computation from raw downloads that cannot be reliably cited as a single stable URL.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/futures/ORDI — funding rate & OI charts (visual only, no free API)
https://www.coingecko.com/api/documentation — free tier provides /coins/{id}/market_chart but no pre-computed correlations
https://alternative.me/ — does not cover ORDI derivatives
